testcase.name: test_anti_abuse_check_device_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint not found. Status: 404 assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_anti_abuse_protection.py:84: in test_anti_abuse_check_device_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code != 404, f"Endpoint not found. Status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Endpoint not found. Status: 404 E assert 404 != 404 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint not found. Status: 404 assert 404 != 404 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_disposable_email_blocked[test@mailinator.com]

failure.message: AssertionError: Disposable email test@mailinator.com should be BLOCKED but wasn't assert False

testcase.failure: tests/test_anti_abuse_protection.py:143: in test_disposable_email_blocked assert is_blocked, f"Disposable email {email} should be BLOCKED but wasn't" E AssertionError: Disposable email test@mailinator.com should be BLOCKED but wasn't E assert False
